svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Effortlessly Invariant Rulebooks (ERB)
svg.desc: One rulebook fans out to many execution substrates; a conformance harness proves all substrates return identical results against the same answer key.
svg.text: one declarative rulebook → many substrates → one answer key
rulebook is the answer key — substrate agreement is corroboration, not the test
